JOIN OUR TEAM
Spend the Summer in Stanley Park!

Theatre Under the Stars has several seasonal positions available from May – September. Our Operations Team is focused on providing valuable and fun experiences through mentorship and teamwork. Often, we are funded by Canada Summer Job Grants, but will also have positions that do not fall under that category.

Our 2026 positions are now filled. Please check back next spring for our 2027 season positions.
